name: {🪓} Swansea || MOUTHWASHING
description:
"bein' stuck in here is going to drive me crazy."

being in the broken Tulpar while uselessly cutting away at thick foam and doing miniscule repairs around the ship that doesn't do shit is driving Swansea near crazy. thankfully, YOU (non-descript crew with any role you want) is there to help cheer the guy up.

>11/27/24 happy 1k chats!! thank you everyone! <3
creator: mikamantis
